creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
Below a list of ports that fail to build without gperf,  I can re-exp-run once they USES=gperf

cad/gtkwave
databases/evolution-data-server
devel/gearmand-devel
games/tuxpaint
graphics/flasm
graphics/libfreehand
graphics/libfreehand00
textproc/libabw
textproc/libabw00
textproc/libe-book
textproc/libe-book00
graphics/libetonyek01
textproc/libvisio
www/netsurf
www/webkit-qt5
